item.title: Kingu Electrical Shop | Complete Electrical Products & Services Tanzania
item.description: Complete electrical products: Armoured Cables, MCBs, Contactors, Changeover Switches, Timers, Meters, Cable Trays, Transformers, Pumps & more. Order online!

item.title: Kingu Electrical Company Limited | Electrical & Generator Experts in Tanzania
item.description: Kingu Electrical Company Limited provides professional electrical engineering, generator installation, PLC automation, ATS systems, and industrial electrical services across Tanzania.
